<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Chennai Metro project setup, with sample data and scripts.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Project structure, React app, scripts, and data folders created.

- [ ] Customize the Project
  Add more features or data as needed.

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions specified.

- [ ] Compile the Project
  Run `npm install` and `npm run dev` to verify setup.

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  Add tasks if needed for build/test.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Launch with `npm run dev`.

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README and data/script docs created.
